description_long: This is a roughly hewn, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly white coloration and a coarse, jagged texture. One face of the stone features shallow, hand-carved inscriptions, including the text 'LAP 25 JULI TS 92', suggesting it may serve as a commemorative or marker stone. The other surfaces display natural fractures, with some broad, shallow grooves and angular edges, indicating it was likely split or shaped by mechanical means. The stone's surface is matte and unpolished, with visible tool marks and a granular, chalky appearance. Its size and mass suggest it could function as a substantial obstacle or boundary marker in an urban environment, such as a park or roadside. The overall impression is of a utilitarian object, possibly used for demarcation or as a historical marker.
description: A large, irregular white stone with rough, jagged surfaces and hand-carved inscriptions on one face. Its coarse texture and visible tool marks suggest use as a commemorative or boundary marker.
description_view_0: This view highlights the inscribed face with visible carved text and a relatively flat surface compared to the other sides.
description_view_1: This angle shows the stone's broadest, most irregular face, featuring deep grooves and a rugged, fractured texture.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the stone's angular profile and the pronounced, layered grooves running across its surface.
description_view_3: This perspective provides a clear look at the inscribed face, with the text 'LAP 25 JULI TS 92' most legible and the edges appearing rough and chipped.
attribute_location: urban park boundary or roadside memorial
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Hand-carved inscriptions on one face; natural fracture lines and shallow grooves on other surfaces; no regular veining or mottling.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished with visible tool marks; edges are chipped and surfaces show minor abrasion, indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically stands out against manicured urban landscapes or paved surfaces, but may partially blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements.
